chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.312 of 2022 Syed Bahauddin & another Versus Syed Zainuddin & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA 2998/22 2. For orders on CMA 2996/22 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA 2997/24 Dated: 01.02.2024 Mr. Aaqib Hussain holds brief for Mr. Sadruddin Buriro for appellants. -.-.- Counsel for appellants is reported to be out of station and request for adjournment is made on his behalf. This is third date when brief is held on behalf of learned counsel for the appellants. On the previously two dates i.e. 28.09.2022 and 15.11.2022 also brief was held for the learned counsel. It seems that appellants and their counsel have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant High Court Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
